description: You are a thermal/mechanical engineer monitoring the INST satellite. Generate a thermal gradient report using OpenC3 COSMOS Script Runner by collecting 10 consecutive samples of INST HEALTH_STATUS temperatures (TEMP1, TEMP2, TEMP3, and TEMP4) at 1-second intervals. The report must calculate the spatial thermal gradient (the difference between the highest and lowest temperature) for each sample and identify the peak gradient across the set, assigning a status of 'WARNING' if the peak exceeds 15.0°C or 'NOMINAL' otherwise. Save the structured JSON report to /home/ga/Desktop/thermal_gradient_report.json containing: 'target' ('INST'), 'packet' ('HEALTH_STATUS'), 'samples' (array of 10 objects with 'timestamp', 'temp1', 'temp2', 'temp3', 'temp4', and 'gradient'), 'peak_gradient', 'limit' (15.0), and 'status'. OpenC3 password: Cosmos2024!
